name: homepage_0_home

facts.note: "Grow Your Mind" email capture is visible near the footer.
The email field asks only for an address and does not offer a discount or other signup incentive.
No review stars, testimonials, or customer quotes are visible on the sampled homepage.
CTAs include "Shop," "Shop All," and fragrance/product-level links.
The homepage leads with a strong brand point of view and shows value statements such as free shipping and swaps.

observed_strengths.observation: Homepage merchandising is strong and immediately product-led, with direct paths into fragrance and category discovery.
Footer email capture is consistently present on the homepage rather than being hidden on account pages only.

missing_or_weak.observation: Homepage email capture is visible but not incentivized.
The sampled homepage relies on brand imagery and product merchandising without visible customer-proof elements.

purchase_path_notes: The homepage is strong at moving shoppers into catalog browsing, but its email capture is low-friction rather than high-value.
